headline: PAYX Q1 Deep Dive: AI Initiatives and Paycor Integration Shape Growth Outlook
summary: Human capital management company Paychex (NASDAQ:PAYX) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 19.9% year on year to $1.81 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.71 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
